name: typedoc
usage_summary: Used exclusively in packages/cli-kit/scripts/build-api-docs.js — a standalone doc-generation script that is not part of the production build or test pipeline. It calls TypeDocApp.bootstrapWithPlugins() and app.generateDocs() to emit HTML API docs into docs/api/cli-kit. No source file under src/ imports typedoc.
how_to_remove: Delete or replace packages/cli-kit/scripts/build-api-docs.js. If API docs are still needed, the script could be replaced with a simpler alternative (e.g. tsdoc + api-extractor) or the docs pipeline could be moved to a dedicated CI job that installs typedoc independently without it being a declared dependency of cli-kit.
replacement_reason: Used only in an optional doc-generation script, not in any production or test code. Removing it from the package.json dependency list has zero runtime impact.
